***REMOVED***path-parse [![Build Status](https://travis-ci.org/jbgutierrez/path-parse.svg?branch=master)](https://travis-ci.org/jbgutierrez/path-parse)

> Node.js [`path.parse(pathString)`](https://nodejs.org/api/path.html#path_path_parse_pathstring) [ponyfill](https://ponyfill.com).

#***REMOVED***Install

```
$ npm install --save path-parse
```

#***REMOVED***Usage

```js
var pathParse = require('path-parse');

pathParse('/home/user/dir/file.txt');
//=> {
//       root : "/",
//       dir : "/home/user/dir",
//       base : "file.txt",
//       ext : ".txt",
//       name : "file"
//   }
```

#***REMOVED***API

See [`path.parse(pathString)`](https://nodejs.org/api/path.html#path_path_parse_pathstring) docs.

##***REMOVED***pathParse(path)

##***REMOVED***pathParse.posix(path)

The Posix specific version.

##***REMOVED***pathParse.win32(path)

The Windows specific version.
